# Khayyam Wakil

> Award-winning Innovative Generalist. CEO of The Artofficial Company. Pioneering frontier technology for 20+ years. Specialist in World's Firsts across immersive media, experiential, strategy, and emerging tech. Based in Pioneertown, CA (YVR / LAX / LIS).

Khayyam Wakil (@iamkhayyam) is an Emmy-winning creative technologist and executive with a 20+ year track record of firsts: first 360° Super Bowl livestream, first pope livestream, first immersive Emmy, first Intel chipset-embedded 360 SDK, first holograms at the Super Bowl, first game-based learning curriculum at scale in Mexico, world's biggest drive-in at SoFi Stadium. His company The Artofficial Company (artofficial.ai) delivers World's Firsts for marquee clients across Sony, NFL, AEG, Warner Bros, and beyond.

## Pages

- [Home](https://iamkhayyam.xyz/): Overview, featured work, capabilities, experience, speaking, writing, contact
- [Work](https://iamkhayyam.xyz/work/): Capabilities, 30+ selected projects, full work history, advisory, education
- [Awards](https://iamkhayyam.xyz/awards/): Complete award record — Emmy, ×3 Cannes Grand Prix, ×26 Lions, One Show, D&AD, Gunn Report
- [Speaking](https://iamkhayyam.xyz/speaking/): 34 talks (2010–2022) — SXSW, Consensus, IBC, NAB, CES, KOCCA, Slush Play, Paramount Studios
- [Writing](https://iamkhayyam.xyz/writing/): 2 books, 5+ essays, press features in WSJ, Fortune, TechCrunch, NBC, Slate
- [Play](https://iamkhayyam.xyz/play/): Side projects and experiments
- [Learn](https://iamkhayyam.xyz/learn/): Learning resources and knowledge sharing
